englishDefinition: Put the doer before the action; Students study.
chineseTranslation: 主詞加動詞；先寫做動作的人或事物

englishDefinition: Use be before a describing word; The class is useful.
chineseTranslation: 主詞加 be 動詞加形容詞；描述主詞的狀態

englishDefinition: Use this to say something exists; There are two reasons.
chineseTranslation: 用來表示某事物存在；單數用 there is 複數用 there are

englishDefinition: Use a or an before one non-specific countable thing; an idea.
chineseTranslation: 可數單數名詞前用 a 或 an；表示不特定的一個

englishDefinition: Use the for a known or specific thing; the assignment.
chineseTranslation: 特定或雙方都知道的名詞前使用 the

englishDefinition: Match a plural subject with a plural verb; Students need help.
chineseTranslation: 複數主詞搭配複數動詞形式

englishDefinition: Add s to a present-tense verb after he she or it; She works.
chineseTranslation: 現在簡單式中 he she it 後的動詞通常加 s

englishDefinition: Use the base verb after did; Did you submit it?
chineseTranslation: did 後使用原形動詞

englishDefinition: Use this for a past action connected to now; I have finished.
chineseTranslation: 現在完成式；表示過去行動與現在有關

englishDefinition: Use this for an action in progress; They are waiting.
chineseTranslation: 進行式；表示正在進行的動作

englishDefinition: Use this when the receiver is more important; The class was canceled.
chineseTranslation: 被動語態；重點放在接受動作的人或事物

englishDefinition: Use to plus the base verb after want or need; I need to leave.
chineseTranslation: want 或 need 後接 to 加原形動詞

englishDefinition: Use an ing form after enjoy or avoid; I enjoy reading.
chineseTranslation: enjoy 或 avoid 後接動名詞

englishDefinition: Use the base verb after a modal; We should prepare.
chineseTranslation: 情態動詞 can 或 should 後接原形動詞

englishDefinition: Give a reason with a subject and verb; I left because I was ill.
chineseTranslation: because 後接包含主詞和動詞的完整原因子句

englishDefinition: Give a reason with a noun; The class moved because of the storm.
chineseTranslation: because of 後接名詞或名詞片語

englishDefinition: Show an unexpected contrast; Although it was hard I finished.
chineseTranslation: although 加完整子句表示讓步轉折

englishDefinition: State a real future condition; If I have time I will attend.
chineseTranslation: 真實未來條件句；if 子句用現在式主句用 will

englishDefinition: Compare two things; Online study is more flexible than class study.
chineseTranslation: 比較兩件事；表示前者比後者更……

englishDefinition: Show equal degree; The book is as useful as the video.
chineseTranslation: 表示兩者程度相同；和……一樣……

englishDefinition: Use a plural noun after this phrase; one of the reasons.
chineseTranslation: one of the 後接複數名詞；表示其中之一

englishDefinition: Add information about a thing; a course that teaches design.
chineseTranslation: 用 that 或 which 子句補充說明事物

englishDefinition: Add information about a person; a teacher who helps students.
chineseTranslation: 用 who 子句補充說明人物

englishDefinition: Use a noun or ing form after a preposition; before leaving.
chineseTranslation: 介系詞後接名詞或動名詞
